$notes: Unified preset bundle. Each preset declares cadence_default + cadence_supported; each variant carries period-keyed retention and arpu_per_period maps plus an optional funnel array. Numeric values are unchanged from v1 (docs/presets.json) and v2 (docs/presets-subscription.json) — only field shape was migrated.

presets.label: iGaming — Online Casino
presets.quality_warning: Public iGaming benchmarks are scarce. Numbers triangulated from operator earnings (DraftKings, Flutter), Eilers & Krejcik tracker citations, and affiliate-network disclosures. Acquisition channel (SEO-affiliate vs. paid social vs. paid TV) drives 30-50% variance.

presets.label: iGaming — Sportsbook
presets.quality_warning: Sportsbook is seasonal (NFL/Premier League). US CAC was inflated 2020-2023 during state-launch land grab; normalizing in 2024+. DFS cross-sell channel delivers 30-50% better retention than paid social.

presets.label: Mobile Games — Hyper-casual
presets.quality_warning: Pure hyper-casual is in secular decline (-4% installs YoY, AppsFlyer 2024); converging with hybrid-casual. iOS CPI is 3-5x Android.

presets.label: Mobile Games — Casual (Match-3, Puzzle, Lifestyle)
presets.quality_warning: Top-quartile vs. median diverge by 5-10x on ARPDAU (largest spread of any vertical). Match-3 has steepest CAC and longest payback (12-18mo iOS NAMER).

presets.label: Mobile Games — Midcore (Strategy, RPG, Shooter)
presets.quality_warning: First-month payback rare; D90+ ROAS is the operative metric. ATT opt-in materially lower (~30-35% NAMER) — top-quartile iOS likely under-reported. Genshin/RAID-tier RPGs distort segment averages.

presets.label: E-commerce (mobile + web shopping)
presets.quality_warning: Two materially different sub-types: marketplaces (Amazon, eBay, Temu) vs. DTC brand apps. AppsFlyer: avg user makes first purchase 3.6 days after install; 75% of remarketing conversions in week 1.

presets.label: Fintech / Banking apps
presets.quality_warning: Highest D30 retention of consumer apps (11.6% median, Plotline 2024). Massive sub-segment variance: neobank vs. traditional bank vs. investment vs. crypto = effectively 4 different businesses. Numbers below assume neobank baseline.

presets.label: Utilities (VPN, cleaners, scanners)
presets.quality_warning: Heavily weekly-plan dominant (73.6% revenue from weekly per Adapty 2026). Utilities have shortest avg session, highest weekly retention but lowest annual retention. VPN is sub-segment with highest pricing power. CIS-built leaders: many VPN apps in this space. Weekly cadence retention curves anchored to Adapty SOIS 2026 first-renewal benchmark + global weekly conversion funnel (W1 direct, W2-W5 via global ratios, W8-W26 via power-law extrapolation toward Day-380 anchor of 5.5%). Per-quartile/per-geo weekly data not publicly disclosed; only median|T1 and top_quartile|T1 weekly curves provided.

presets.label: Lifestyle / Wellness (habit trackers, meditation)
presets.quality_warning: RevenueCat groups Lifestyle with Social, which includes Dating — Lifestyle-only numbers are estimates within that group. Meditation apps (Calm, Headspace) drive the high end; habit trackers struggle. Annual plans dominate revenue mix.

presets.label: Health & Fitness (workout, calorie tracking, weight loss)
presets.quality_warning: Best-monetizing category in RevenueCat data: median D60 RPI $0.63 (2x category avg). Annual plans dominate (60.6% revenue). Top 10% trial-to-paid 68.3% — exceptional. CIS-built leader: BetterMe (large H&F player).

presets.label: Photo / Video Editors
presets.quality_warning: Lowest median trial-to-paid of consumer subs (26.2% RevenueCat 2024) but highest spread top vs. bottom (3x). Heavily weekly-plan, refund-rate prone. CIS-built leaders: Reface, FaceApp, Prequel — typical viral spike + churn pattern. Weekly cadence retention curves anchored to Adapty SOIS 2026 first-renewal benchmark + global weekly conversion funnel (W1 direct, W2-W5 via global ratios, W8-W26 via power-law extrapolation toward Day-380 anchor of 5.5%). Per-quartile/per-geo weekly data not publicly disclosed; only median|T1 and top_quartile|T1 weekly curves provided.

presets.label: Language Learning
presets.quality_warning: Duolingo dominates: 8.5-8.9% paid penetration of 113M MAU in 2024. Long trials (5-9 days dominate) lead to higher conversion. Heavy organic growth (Duolingo S&M only 10-12% of revenue).

presets.label: Dating Apps
presets.quality_warning: Public 10-Q data (Match, Bumble) is gold standard — better than RevenueCat which buckets dating into Social & Lifestyle. Hybrid model: subscriptions + boosts/super-likes (consumables). Tinder churn structurally high — users leave when they find a match (success churn). CIS-built: Mamba, Badoo (Bumble Inc).

presets.label: AI Companions / Chatbots
presets.quality_warning: Fastest-growing category 2024-2025 (+64% YoY revenue, +88% downloads). Replika/Character.AI/Chai dominate top of market — top 10% capture 89% of revenue. Replika has unusually high free→paid conversion (25%, vs typical 2-5%). Numbers will likely shift quickly — refresh quarterly. CIS-built leader: Replika (Eugenia Kuyda / Luka).
